pages.title: LLM Wiki
pages.body_preview: # LLM Wiki An `LLM Wiki` is a knowledge-management pattern in which an LLM continuously compiles raw source material into a persistent, structured, interlinked markdown wiki. ## Core Idea The key shift is from query-time rediscovery to persistent synthesis. pages.title: What Is dBm
pages.body_preview: # What Is dBm ## Question What does the formula on the board mean, and how should `dBm` be interpreted? ## Core Definition `dBm` is a logarithmic power unit referenced to `1 mW`. Formula: ```text dBm = 10 log10(P / 1 mW) ``` Where: - `P` is power - the reference value is `1 mW` #
